tb3-validate.description: Run TB3 Step 2a idea validation/spec workflow.
tb3-validate.template: Run the TB3 Step 2a idea-validation workflow for: $ARGUMENTS. Read AGENTS.md, .cursor/rules/00-authoring-critical.mdc, .cursor/rules/idea-validation.mdc, .cursor/rules/difficulty-calibration.mdc, workflow-prompts.md, and commands.md before acting. Do not create tasks/<task-name>/ during Step 2a. Use validate_loop.py exactly as documented and show command output before claiming a GO spec.

tb3-author.description: Run TB3 Step 2b task construction workflow.
tb3-author.template: Use the tb3-task-author skill and run the TB3 Step 2b construction workflow for task: $ARGUMENTS. Read AGENTS.md, .cursor/rules/00-authoring-critical.mdc, .cursor/skills/tb3-task-author/SKILL.md, .cursor/rules/task-creation.mdc, .cursor/rules/difficulty-calibration.mdc, commands.md, and specs/$ARGUMENTS.md Authoring Brief before editing. After any task edit, run ./scripts/check-task.sh tasks/$ARGUMENTS, oracle 1x, and NOP before claiming Step 2b PASS.

tb3-review.description: Run TB3 Step 3b paper review workflow.
tb3-review.template: Use the tb3-reviewer skill and run the TB3 Step 3b paper-review workflow for task: $ARGUMENTS. Read AGENTS.md, .cursor/rules/00-authoring-critical.mdc, .cursor/skills/tb3-reviewer/SKILL.md, .cursor/rules/review-and-submit.mdc, .cursor/rules/difficulty-calibration.mdc, .cursor/rules/task-creation.mdc, and commands.md. Start with python3 task_integrity.py verify tasks/$ARGUMENTS. If integrity is stale, stop and return to Step 2b.

tb3-package.description: Run TB3 Step 4 final approval and packaging workflow.
tb3-package.template: Use the tb3-packager skill and run the TB3 Step 4 final approval workflow for task: $ARGUMENTS. Read AGENTS.md, .cursor/rules/00-authoring-critical.mdc, .cursor/skills/tb3-packager/SKILL.md, .cursor/rules/review-and-submit.mdc, and commands.md. Start with python3 task_integrity.py verify tasks/$ARGUMENTS. Then run oracle 10x, NOP, zip validation, approve_task.py, and fixture mirroring exactly as documented. Stop on first failure and never claim READY, APPROVED, or SUBMIT without command output.
